meanings.definition: one of a pair of long straps (usually connected to the bit or the headpiece) used to control a horse

examples: he took up the reins of government

meanings.definition: control and direct with or as if by reins
stop or slow up one's horse or oneself by or as if by pulling the reins
examples: They reined in in front of the post office

meanings.definition: stop or check by or as if by a pull at the reins
examples: He reined in his horses in front of the post office
